project.name: ProductTrapper
project.description: Product Hunt featured products tracker (Astro 6 + Cloudflare Workers)

instructions.beforeBuild: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build` to verify changes. Use `SKIP_PREBUILD=true` to skip API fetching when a cached posts.json exists.
instructions.beforeDeploy: Run `npm run build` then `npm run deploy`. Ensure CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, and PH_DEVELOPER_TOKEN are configured.
instructions.dataFetch: Use `node scripts/fetch-posts.js --incremental` for daily updates; full fetch uses `node scripts/fetch-posts.js`.
instructions.specSource: Always consult spec.md as the single source of truth before adding features.
